description.default: This plugin supports SiYuan configuration of self-built image bed, allowing easy upload of local resource files to personal self-built image bed, and Flask backend implements accepting image upload and returning image link.
description.zh_CN: 本插件支持思源配置自建图床，可以轻松上传本地资源文件到个人自建图床，Flask后端实现接受图片上传并返回图片链接。
